CustomField.formula:
IF(TEXT(Insolvency_Type__c) == 'Consumer Proposal' || TEXT(Insolvency_Type__c) == 'Division 1 Proposal',
$Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.Trustee_Administration_Fee__c + $Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.Counselling_Fee__c + $Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.Receiver_Fee__c + Previous_Trustee_Variable_Fees_Formula__c + ( ( Previous_Trustee_Variable_Fees_Formula__c + $Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.Trustee_Administration_Fee__c + $Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.Counselling_Fee__c ) * $Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.HST_Tax_Rate__c ),
null)
CustomField.label: Previous Trustee Fees_Formula
